rules.title: Network IOC Detection [0221f6c766f1]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [0221f6c766f1]
id: cdb-net-0221f6c766f1
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 13 malicious IPs and 13 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-27
modified: 2026-04-27
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '1.53.114.181'
            - '104.28.160.197'
            - '114.10.99.126'
            - '124.248.183.139'
            - '130.12.182.154'
            - '157.15.40.74'
            - '202.56.2.126'
            - '209.146.60.26'
            - '49.156.40.126'
            - '83.147.12.83'
            - '1.26.0.138'
            - '1.26.0.134'
            - '21.1.1.50'
        DestinationHostname|contains:
            - 'docs.metasploit.com'
            - 'gmail.com'
            - 'metasploit.com'
            - 'api.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'blog.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'intel.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'tools.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'www.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'java.io'
            - 'file.io'
            - 'security.snyk.io'
            - 'blog.hartwork.org'
    condition: selection
level: medium
falsepositives:
    - Shared hosting infrastructure
    - CDN/cloud provider IP overlap
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://cyberdudebivash.com/threat-intel

rules.title: File Hash Detection [0221f6c766f1]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Malicious File Hash Detection [0221f6c766f1]
id: cdb-hash-0221f6c766f1
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 11 malicious file hashes
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-27
tags:
    - attack.execution
    - attack.t1204
    - attack.defense_evasion
logsource:
    category: file_event
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        Hashes|contains:
            - '1b62b7c2ed7cc296ce821f977ef7b22bae59ef1dcdb9a34ae19467ee39bcf168'
            - '97c275e3406ad6576529f41604ad138c5bdc4297d195bf61b049e14f6b30adfd'

            - '004f783b1db5ecdfad81c8fdc3b34171211112de'
            - 'a053632c41340152bf75b66b3c543d129123d8ec'
            - '9ed9f153ba4158a2ad230ee4871b25130da29ffd'
            - '13607645e14a4982468cfdbcf75c85cde63bae71'
            - 'e540d6dc04e2e6ad11907fb655f3728a13e7b939'
            - '0284a5bcf92b5a7ee015300ce3051baf7ae4718d'
            - 'f8f4f1e02fdc64ecd4acf2d903208dd7285ad3a4'

rules.title: Phishing Detection [0221f6c766f1]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Phishing Sender Detection [0221f6c766f1]
id: cdb-phish-0221f6c766f1
status: production
description: Detects emails from known malicious senders
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-27
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1566
logsource:
    category: email
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        SenderAddress:
            - 'bcoles@gmail.com'
            - 'theLightCosine@metasploit.com'
            - 'bivash@cyberdudebivash.com'
    condition: selection
level: high
falsepositives:
    - Spoofed sender addresses
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com

        $ip_2 = "114.10.99.126" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_3 = "124.248.183.139" ascii wide nocase

        $dom_13 = "docs.metasploit.com" ascii wide nocase

        $dom_16 = "api.cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_17 = "blog.cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_18 = "cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_19 = "intel.cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_20 = "tools.cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_21 = "www.cyberdudebivash.com" ascii wide nocase
